canonical_definition: An evaluation task in SciRIFF-Eval for relation extraction, requiring the identification of six entity types from a computer science abstract.

relationships.evidence: In our study, we conduct experiments on two general datasets (REBEL-Sub (Huguet Cabot and Navigli, 2021) and GenWiki (Jin et al., 2020)) and two domain-specific datasets (SCIERC (Luan et al., 2018) and the Windows-centric subset of Re-DocRED (Tan et al., 2022)) with golden ground truth KGs (Section 5.1.1).
